videos.headline: Sam Houston State WR makes Odell-style catch
videos.description: Sam Houston State's Davion Davis leaps to make a tremendous one-handed catch for a 22-yard gain.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Sam Houston State WR makes Odell-style catch) 2018/09/29
